proposal.working_title: AI Email Automation in 2026: The Operator's Playbook for Sequences That Actually Reply
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI email guides chase open rates; this one starts with reply intent and shows how to chain Claude prose with a Make router and a CRM trigger so sequences feel hand-typed and book the call.
outline_bullets: Why most AI email sequences kill reply rates (and the three lead-scoring signals to optimize instead)
The 5-tool stack for hand-typed-feeling AI sequences: Claude prose, Make routing, the CRM trigger, and two enrichment APIs
From first-touch to booked call: the 9-step sequence map FirstMovers uses for done-for-you sales lift
